summary: Applied the private NetBox runtime live on docker-runtime-lv3, provisioned its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, published operator and agent access through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy, and synchronized the canonical repository topology and IPAM inventory into the NetBox API.

verification.observed: make converge-netbox completed successfully from the main integration worktree after stabilizing NetBox 4.5 bootstrap token handling, service-object payloads, and transient API retry behavior.
curl returned HTTP 200 from http://100.118.189.95:8004/login/ through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy.
Authorized API queries returned 6 synchronized virtual machines: backup-lv3, docker-build-lv3, docker-runtime-lv3, monitoring-lv3, nginx-lv3, and postgres-lv3.

verification.check: Governed service inventory sync and idempotency
verification.observed: Authorized API queries returned 11 synchronized service objects and the second repo-to-NetBox sync run reported changed=false with updated=0.

notes: The live rollout had to replace the initial stale local v1-style token artifact with a NetBox 4.5 bearer token in the nbt_<key>.<token> format before the API bootstrap path became idempotent.

The repo sync now derives governed service ports from documented Tailscale proxy definitions, private and published ingress data, and lane-catalog API surfaces so NetBox stays aligned with canonical topology metadata instead of manual UI edits.
